etymology.description: Depicts a bifurcated wooden plow with originally three cross lines for the furrows -> later simplified to two lines -> represents a plow
etymology.interpretation: 耒 (lěi, "plow") is a pictogram showing the shape of an ancient plow, with the bifurcated base and cross lines representing the furrows it created in the soil. This visualization effectively conveys the idea of a plowing tool.
